summary.en: There is no confirmed national EV charging back-office platform in Sao Tome and Principe. For public, fleet, hotel, airport, port, or donor-funded chargers, OCPP interoperability is nevertheless a practical procurement requirement because it allows remote monitoring, payment or access control, fault reporting, energy reporting, and load management across a small dispersed island network. EMC evidence should follow IEC 61000-family expectations, particularly for harmonic emissions, immunity, surge, and conducted/radiated disturbance in a weak-grid environment.
summary.zh: 未能确认圣多美和普林西比存在全国电动汽车充电后台平台。但对于公共、车队、酒店、机场、港口或援助资金充电桩，OCPP互操作仍是实务采购要求，因为它可在小型分散海岛网络中支持远程监控、支付或访问控制、故障报告、用电报告和负载管理。EMC证据应遵循IEC 61000体系预期，尤其关注弱电网环境下的谐波发射、抗扰度、浪涌以及传导/辐射骚扰。
summary.zht: 未能確認聖多美和普林西比存在全國電動汽車充電後台平台。但對於公共、車隊、酒店、機場、港口或援助資金充電樁，OCPP互操作仍是實務採購要求，因為它可在小型分散海島網絡中支持遠程監控、支付或訪問控制、故障報告、用電報告和負載管理。EMC證據應遵循IEC 61000體系預期，尤其關注弱電網環境下的諧波發射、抗擾度、浪湧以及傳導/輻射騷擾。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked charger back-office communication
IEC 61000 series — EMC, immunity, harmonics, flicker, and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — DC charger to EV digital communication context
Project-specific CPO, donor, fleet, or site-owner network requirements

summary.en: China DC fast charging uses GB/T 27930-2023 for charger-to-vehicle communication and may use operator-specific back-office protocols. GB/T 27930 is a CAN communication protocol for DC charging and is not an OCPP back-office standard. China EMC documentation may not address IEC 61000 reports, weak-grid harmonic limits, or the radio and cellular modules selected for Sao Tome and Principe operation.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 27930-2023作为桩车通信协议，并可能使用运营商私有后台协议。GB/T 27930是直流充电CAN通信协议，不是OCPP后台标准。中国EMC文件可能未覆盖IEC 61000报告、弱电网谐波限值，或圣多美和普林西比运行所选无线/蜂窝模块。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 27930-2023作為樁車通訊協議，並可能使用運營商私有後台協議。GB/T 27930是直流充電CAN通訊協議，不是OCPP後台標準。中國EMC文件可能未覆蓋IEC 61000報告、弱電網諧波限值，或聖多美和普林西比運行所選無線/蜂窩模組。

standards_or_laws: China domestic EMC test evidence where available

gap.en: Confirm the required OCPP version, SIM or Ethernet connectivity, remote diagnostics, payment or access-control workflow, language and tariff settings, cybersecurity settings, and data-export format. For EMC, provide IEC 61000 test evidence, harmonic data, surge protection details, cable shielding and earthing design, and confirmation that any radio modules are permitted for local use. GB/T 27930 does not solve OCPP back-office requirements.
gap.zh: 应确认所需OCPP版本、SIM或以太网连接、远程诊断、支付或访问控制流程、语言和费率设置、网络安全设置及数据导出格式。EMC方面，应提供IEC 61000测试证据、谐波数据、浪涌保护细节、电缆屏蔽和接地设计，并确认无线模块可在当地使用。GB/T 27930不能解决OCPP后台要求。
gap.zht: 應確認所需OCPP版本、SIM或以太網連接、遠程診斷、支付或訪問控制流程、語言和費率設置、網絡安全設置及數據導出格式。EMC方面，應提供IEC 61000測試證據、諧波數據、浪湧保護細節、電纜屏蔽和接地設計，並確認無線模組可在當地使用。GB/T 27930不能解決OCPP後台要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where networked operation, public access, fleet monitoring, payment, donor reporting, or site-owner control is specified; EMC evidence is expected for electrical equipment projects
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 applies to China domestic DC charger-to-vehicle communication and is not an OCPP or IEC 61000 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For networked chargers, specify OCPP and IEC 61000 EMC evidence separately from GB/T 27930. Weak-grid operation, remote monitoring, and surge resilience are practical acceptance issues in Sao Tome and Principe projects.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对联网充电桩，应将OCPP和IEC 61000 EMC证据与GB/T 27930分开规定。弱电网运行、远程监控和浪涌韧性是圣多美和普林西比项目的实际验收问题。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對聯網充電樁，應將OCPP和IEC 61000 EMC證據與GB/T 27930分開規定。弱電網運行、遠程監控和浪湧韌性是聖多美和普林西比項目的實際驗收問題。
